name: @tong/extension
description: Tong Chrome Extension - CJK Language Learning

scripts.dev: vite build --watch --mode development && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts --watch --mode development
scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts && vite build --config vite.interceptor.config.ts
scripts.build:prod: vite build --mode production && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts --mode production && vite build --config vite.interceptor.config.ts --mode production
